link_meta.page_excerpt: Striim RSVP - Pre Day at Google NEXT --> --> Press start before Google Next kicks off. Day Zero: Data Origins Tuesday, April 21st | 10:00am - 6:00pm | Las Vegas Coffee • Lunch on us • Get Striim certified • Giveaways • Happy hour Before the main quest begins, drop into Day Zero: Data Origins —start with coffee, have lunch on us, and dive into a low-pressure, builder-focused space with real conversations and real-time solutions. Free Play Mode | Drop in anytime Unlock achievements by getting Striim certified, grab a limited-edition t-shirt, and speed-run building AI pipelines in minutes—no heavy lift required. 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM | Spawn Point: Coffee + Arrival Ease in with coffee, snacks, and a comfortable place to land while you wait for hotel check-in or connect with early arrivals. 12:00 PM – 2:00 PM | Power-Up Lunch: Live Build Session Fuel up while diving into hands-on demos—build a real-time pipeline, validate data in-flight, and see how AI-ready data comes together in minutes. 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM | Sandbox Mode: Explore + Experiment Bring a real use case or just tinker—test pipelines, troubleshoot data quality, and explore zero-downtime migration patterns with experts. 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM | Social Mode Unlocked: Happy Hour Wrap the day with drinks, music, and easy networking—continue conversations or start new ones in a relaxed setting. link_meta.page_excerpt: Come join us for a relaxed but high-energy networking event during Google Next Cloud. This isn't a panel session — it's a room full of ambitious founders, C-suite leaders, and venture capital partners exchanging real stories, practical insights, and future-facing ideas. ​ ​We'll dive into how today's fastest-growing startups are: ​ ​🤖 Leveraging AI-driven strategies and tools to move faster, smarter, and leaner ​ ​📈 Building GTM playbooks that actually scale ​ ​💰 Raising capital in a shifting venture market ​ ​🚀 Growing from a handful of engineers to 100+ strong teams ​ ​🏆 Breaking through $1M ARR milestones ​ ​Expect open conversations about the challenges, trade-offs, and tools that define startup life today. Whether you're scaling your first product 🛠️, raising your next round 💼, or experimenting with AI in your stack 🤖 — you'll leave with new connections, sharper insights 💡, and maybe even your next collaborator or investor. ​ ​Early-stage founders to growth-stage SaaS companies mix with active investors, VCs, and ecosystem partners in an environment built for collaboration 🤝, partnerships, and future deals. As organizations move to an AI-first cloud, success depends less on models and infrastructure and more on the foundations that let intelligence scale securely and deliver value day to day. That’s what we mean by AI that works. Join us April 22–24 in Las Vegas to see how we help teams rebuild core systems, rewire them for intelligent agents and reimagine how software is built and evolved. You’ll also get a look at AI/works™ , our new agentic development platform and how it keeps enterprise systems current as needs regulations and models change. Visit us at Booth #5504 (Main Expo) and the Public Sector Hub to explore the three pathways to AI readiness: rebuild the core, rewire for agents and reimagine value. AI that works for a seamless government experience Government agencies face rising expectations with limited room for error. Legacy systems and fragmented operations make it harder to deliver the simple, transparent services people rely on. Stop choosing between legacy stability and AI innovation. At Google Cloud Next 2026, Thoughtworks is showcasing how to build a Seamless Government Experience — a composable enterprise where services and data are assembled, not siloed. link_meta.page_excerpt: An exclusive sunset dinner at Cascata Step away from the noise of Google Cloud Next into something exceptional. During the energy and intensity of Google Cloud Next, we invite you to pause and elevate your experience. Join Valtech and Optimizely for an unforgettable private evening at Cascata Golf Club, one of the most breathtaking venues in Las Vegas. Nestled against dramatic red rock canyons and overlooking sweeping desert landscapes, Cascata offers a setting that feels worlds away from the Strip — especially at sunset. This exclusive gathering brings together a curated group of industry leaders for an evening of perspective, conversation and refined hospitality. Your experience includes: Private car transfers from Mandalay Bay to Cascata Sunset cocktails overlooking the canyon Optional private golf lessons with access to Cascata’s state-of-the-art facilities (feel free to bring a change of clothes and shoes) An elegant private dinner as the desert sky transforms at golden hour Return transfers to your hotel on the Strip As the sun sets over the mountains and the city lights begin to glow in the distance, dinner will unfold in an atmosphere designed for meaningful dialogue and genuine connection. This is not a typical conference event. It’s a rare opportunity to experience Las Vegas differently — privately, intentionally and in exceptional company. link_meta.page_excerpt: All Events Google Cloud Next 2026 The Speedscale team will be at Google Cloud Next in Las Vegas, April 22-24. We'd love to connect face-to-face and talk about testing and validating your Google Cloud applications. Join our Happy Hour Schedule a meeting Las Vegas, NV • April 22-24 Let's talk about testing on Google Cloud Google Cloud Next brings together cloud engineers, platform teams, and technology leaders from across the ecosystem. We'll be attending the conference and are happy to meet face-to-face to discuss how Speedscale helps teams test and validate applications running on GKE, Cloud Run, and other Google Cloud services. Reach out ahead of time so we can find a good time to connect during the event. Traffic replay for Google Cloud workloads See how Speedscale captures production traffic from GKE, Cloud Run, and other Google Cloud services, then replays it to validate changes before deployment. Service virtualization without full environments Learn how teams mock complex Google Cloud dependencies to run faster, more reliable integration tests without spinning up costly staging environments. eBPF-powered observability and testing Explore how Speedscale's eBPF collector captures encrypted traffic with zero code changes — no sidecars, no certificate management, no production overhead. You're invited Happy Hour with Speedscale Join us for drinks and conversation on Thursday, April 23 from 5:00 – 7:00 PM at Flanker Kitchen + Sports Bar , right near the convention center. It's a great way to unwind after a full day of sessions and chat with the Speedscale team in a relaxed setting. Space is limited. Fill out the form below to reserve your spot.
